motion.name: spring-standard
motion.purpose: Default framer-motion spring for state transitions.

motion.name: skeleton-shimmer
motion.purpose: Loading placeholders via .skeleton — not decorative idle chrome.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid gold CTA — scarce action signal.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--cb-accent, #FEAC27); color: var(--cb-bg, #0E1319); padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font: 600 14px/20px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--cb-accent, #FEAC27); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: var(--cb-surface-raised, #1A212C); color: #6B7280; opacity: 1; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary / Back — quiet, no gold fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #fff; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius: 12px; font: 400 14px/20px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.16); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--cb-accent, #FEAC27); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Ink well + hairline; gold focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field-label { font: 600 12px/16px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: var(--cb-bg, #0E1319); color: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; font: 400 14px/20px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6B7280; } .ds-input:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.16); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: transparent; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--cb-accent, #FEAC27); }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Quiet panel with hairline — no heavy chrome.
components.html:
Locations

Add storefronts and MIDs.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--cb-surface, #161C26); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.40); } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 4px; font: 600 20px/28px Poppins, Inter, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.015em; color: #fff; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font: 400 14px/20px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }

components.name: Status Dot
components.description: Status as 6px dot + caption — not a tinted pill.
components.html: Ready to Submit
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font: 400 12px/16px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); } .ds-status-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--cb-success, #4ADE80); flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Progress Capsule
components.description: Active step — muted gold fill + hairline.
components.html: 123
components.css: .ds-progress { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .ds-progress-step { width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 9999px; display: grid; place-items: center; font: 600 12px/16px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); background: transparent; } .ds-progress-step--active { background: rgba(254,172,39,0.14); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.16); color: var(--cb-accent, #FEAC27); } .ds-progress-step--done { background: var(--cb-accent, #FEAC27); border-color: transparent; color: var(--cb-bg, #0E1319); }

narrative.overview: One bright signal runs through charcoal structure. The portal is a dark, quiet tool for finishing KYC, banking, and e-sign — modern and confident, never theatrical. Gold appears where the merchant must act. Everything else stays tonal. This system rejects generic purple/gradient AI SaaS dashboards, busy traditional bank portals, and playful consumer apps.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained dark fintech: one accent ≤ ~10% of any screen
Hierarchy via indentation, 1px rails, and type — not colored chrome
Solid gold primary CTAs; ghost secondary
Exactly five type sizes; Poppins for titles, Inter for UI
Motion only for state (spring 150/20); quote documents stay white

rules.name: The One Wire Rule
rules.body: Cliqbux Gold is for action and selection only. Do not decorate inactive chrome with gold.

rules.name: The Token File Rule
rules.body: Approved hex values live only in src/styles/tokens.css. Never invent parallel hex in JSX.

rules.name: The Five Size Rule
rules.body: No other font sizes in the portal.

rules.name: The Two Shadow Rule
rules.body: If you need a third shadow, use a surface step or hairline instead.

dos: Do use cb-* Tailwind utilities and change values only in src/styles/tokens.css.
Do keep primary actions solid Cliqbux Gold (#FEAC27) and scarce.
Do show status as a small colored dot + plain caption.
Do use hierarchy via indentation, 1px rails, and type weight.
Do keep explicit Save buttons (no debounce autosave for entity/MID fields).
Do respect reduced motion; motion communicates state only.
donts: Don't ship Generic purple / gradient “AI SaaS” dashboards.
Don't imitate Busy traditional bank portals with cluttered forms and dense chrome.
Don't build Playful consumer apps heavy on illustration, bounce, and novelty.
Don't use purple/indigo gradients, glow rings, or multi-layer decorative shadows.
Don't use blue MID pills, green “Complete” pills, or color-coded pricing-tier badges.
Don't hardcode hex in JSX or invent a parallel palette (including soft dashboard gold #F0AD4E as a second accent).
Don't add font sizes outside the five-token scale.
Don't change form fields, validation, fetch paths, or save semantics in a “visual” pass.
